title: Pan-Seared Snapper with German Festive Flair
description: A flavorful and festive dish that combines the delicate taste of snapper with traditional German flavors. Perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté until softened.
Add the snapper fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the snapper is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with paprika.
Serve the snapper hot, garnished with lemon wedges.
